tasks.desc: My leg itches, got some cutters?
Anything else to scratch an itch?
This looks important! I can clean it for you!
I could use a new bandage!
I need bigger tools for this.
Here’s a pipe, need more light!
Ewww it stinks! Cover my nose!
It’s not enough. Let’s get creative.
Nothing here. Let’s patch it back.
The leak’s still here! Replacing these bolts.
Where else could this smell be?
The smell is just getting worse!
Old balls of thread in here too.
Old ship. But that’s not the source.
This pipe’s a dead end. Let’s seal it.
Just one more thing to seal the pipe.
A bit more light and I’ll figure this out!
Maybe a pipe in the pool?
Wait, these glass pieces can be glued together.
These glass pieces are a map!
The map points to this stained glass.
Careful, let’s get rid of the glass.
More pipes. Let’s get these out of the way.
I need to dry myself off.
We are close. More flowers before I pass out.
More junk cleared. One step closer.
Let's fix up these pipes for good.
The last pipe is secured. All done!
Now let’s put the glass back in.
Last one and we are all done!
